summary: WIN-067 c6 advocate defense_survives=4 is fully addressed once EXP-215 lands. The c6 best_defense had two prongs: (i) '1,430× vs 170× internal inconsistency — pick one' and (ii) '1,430× presupposes a linear coupling I never published'. Prong (i) was patched in commit db60a9c (1,430× now leads in finding/tldr_evidence/tldr_verdict). EXP-215 Patches 1–4 close prong (ii): finding/tldr fields disclose the linear assumption and bracket with H^(1/5) (~590×) and dimensionless 170×; detail_evidence reframes as IF-THEN built on dome raw-text quotations. Recommended action: downgrade defense_survives to 1 (residual = the 'gravity has no dome-specific equation at all' retreat, which is itself the second self-contradiction the WIN already names). Recommended ISS-1369 status after integration: closed (covered by ISS-1355/1356/1357 closure).
